name: chr3_3q26_31_MECOM_SD
description: 3q26.31 MECOM/EVI1 region with flanking segmental duplications. Site of recurrent inv(3)(q21q26) / t(3;3)(q21;q26) in myeloid malignancies that places a distal GATA2 enhancer next to MECOM; the inversion breakpoints lie in the SD belt.

architecture.internal_structure: Inverted SDs of 30-100 kb at ~95% identity flanking MECOM; somatic inv(3)(q21q26) hijacks the GATA2 enhancer at 3q21 to activate MECOM.
